Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Civil Proceedings, Or Alternatively To Stay Discovery From Austin Ledbetter
Off Calendar May-02-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ronnie Gipson, Jr., Esq. of Higa & Gipson, 415-655-6820 for defendant and moving party Austin Ledbetter
Court Call Appearance: Benjamin Harris, Esq. of The Gersh Law Firm, 818-536-5700 for plaintiff and opposing party Andrew Ponce

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT AUSTIN LEDBETTER'S Notice Of Motion To Stay Civil Proceedings, Or Alternatively To Stay Discovery From Austin Ledbetter. DISCOVERY DIRECTED TOWARD DEFENDANT LEDBETTER IS STAYED PENDING COMPLETION OF HIS CRIMINAL TRIAL. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
